comments: Tommy says he didn't like the Gary Moore single on first listen but has got over himself!
This is the show after Mike Read played Venom on the breakfast show in the morning. Tommy donated £100 to a charity in Northern Ireland and says Read had a 'lot of bottle' to do it!
TV reads a dedication out to a listener from a roadie for the band Jaguar who had just recorded a session for future broadcast (actually 13 April 1984)

sessions.artist: Samson - first broadcast of session recorded 24 February 1984
sessions.details: Paul Samson (guitars), Merv Goldsworthy (bass), Nicky Moore (Vocals), Dave Colwell (guitar), Pete Jupp (drums). Available

sessions.artist: Alaska - repeat of session first broadcast 27 January 1984

track_listing.track: Pat Travers - Snortin' Whisky Drinking Cocaine (LP - Crash & Burn)
Barclay James Harvest - Victims of Circumstance (LP - Victims Of Circumstance)
Judas Priest - Some Heads Are Gonna Roll (LP - Defenders Of The Faith)
Billy Idol - Rebel Yell (LP - Rebel Yell)
Samson - Don't Get Mad, Get Even (session)
David Gilmour - Until We Sleep (LP - About Face)
Zoot Money - The Uncle Willie (LP - Sixties Lost & Found Volume 2)
Manfred Mann's Earth Band - Runner (LP - Somewhere In Africa)
Scorpions - Same Thrill (LP - Love At First Sting)
